Instance.name: racDescription.0
Instance.Value: This system component provides a complete set of remote management functions for Dell PowerEdge Servers

Instance.name: enclosureDisplayName.1
Instance.Value: Backplane 1 on Connector 0 of RAID Controller in Slot 4

Instance.Value: Disk 0 in Backplane 1 of RAID Controller in Slot 4

Instance.name: physicalDiskDisplayName.2
Instance.Value: Disk 1 in Backplane 1 of RAID Controller in Slot 4

Instance.Value: Battery on RAID Controller in Slot 4
